channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ASHIKA] Ashika Credit Capital Securities Admitted to NSE Dealings
item.description:
Ashika Credit Capital Limited's securities have been permitted to trade and admitted to dealings on the National Stock Exchange (NSE) in the Capital Market segment, effective April 20, 2026. The company's symbol on the NSE platform will be ASHIKA. This development follows NSE Download Ref. No. NSE/CML/73797 and Circular Ref. No. 0645/2026 dated April 17, 2026, in compliance with SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

  • Securities admitted to dealings on National Stock Exchange.
  • Trading effective from April 20, 2026.
  • Company symbol on NSE is ASHIKA.
  • Compliance with SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ashika Credit Capital Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [PNGJL] P N Gadgil Records ₹251 Cr Revenue on Akshaya Tritiya
item.description:
🔥 Trending

P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd reported a strong revenue of ₹251 crore on Akshaya Tritiya for FY 2026-27, marking an 80.3% year-on-year growth. This performance, the company's second-highest single-day revenue, was driven by robust volume growth, healthy footfall, and traction across product categories, particularly gold which saw a 79.6% revenue increase. The company also noted significant growth in silver (98.0%) and diamond (79.9%) segments. Management expressed optimism about the current quarter, citing strong consumer demand and positioning for the ongoing wedding season.

  • Recorded ₹251 crore revenue on Akshaya Tritiya, up 80.3% YoY.
  • Gold segment revenue grew 79.6%, silver 98.0%, and diamonds 79.9%.
  • Achieved second-highest single-day revenue performance.
  • Strong volume growth and healthy footfall contributed to the surge.
  • Positive outlook for the current quarter driven by wedding season demand.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [GROWW] Billionbrains Garage Ventures: Appoints Secretarial Auditor, Notes Director Resignation
item.description:
Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd announced key management and audit changes following a Board Meeting. The company approved the appointment of M/s. Nilesh Shah & Associates as Secretarial Auditors for five years, subject to shareholder approval. The Board also noted the resignation of Mr. Ashish Agrawal as Nominee Director, effective April 20, 2026. Additionally, the company approved its audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, along with the auditor's report.

  • Appointed M/s. Nilesh Shah & Associates as Secretarial Auditors for five years.
  • Noted resignation of Mr. Ashish Agrawal as Nominee Director.
  • Approved audited standalone and consolidated financial results for FY26.
  • Results include audit report from BSR & Co. LLP.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ADANITRANS] Adani Energy Solutions Schedules Q4FY26 Investor Calls
item.description:
Adani Energy Solutions Ltd has announced details for investor and analyst calls scheduled for April 24, 2026. These calls will focus on discussing the company's audited financial results for the quarter and full year ended March 31, 2026, as well as the business outlook. The company will be represented by its CEO, CFO, and Head of Finance. Dial-in details for various international locations and a registration link have been provided for participants.

  • Investor calls scheduled for April 24, 2026.
  • Discussion on Q4FY26 and full-year financial results.
  • Business outlook to be presented.
  • Key management personnel to attend.
  • International dial-in numbers provided.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Adani Transmission Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [HIGHNESS] Highness Microelectronics signs MOA for TFT-LCD Module Tech Transfer
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Highness Microelectronics Ltd. has signed a Memorandum of Agreement (MOA) for Technology Transfer with a Chinese manufacturer for glass-cutting and resizing of TFT-LCD Modules. This agreement, signed on April 13th, 2026, aims to localize the production of customized displays for the transportation segment in India, including Railways, Subways, and Metros. The transfer includes proprietary processes, methods, and know-how. Highness Microelectronics has been granted a limited license to manufacture, integrate, market, sell, and distribute these products primarily in India, Australia, and New Zealand, with potential for wider export. This marks a significant step towards indigenization of display manufacturing in India, positioning Highness as the sole holder of this technology in the country for the specified applications.

  • Signed MOA for technology transfer in TFT-LCD Module glass cutting and resizing.
  • Focuses on localization and customization for the transportation segment in India.
  • Includes transfer of proprietary processes, know-how, and technical data.
  • Granted license for manufacturing and sales in India, Australia, and New Zealand.
  • Positions Highness as the sole Indian holder of this specific TFT-LCD technology.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Highness Microelectronics Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [GROWW] Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd: Nominee Director Resigns
item.description:
Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd announced the resignation of Mr. Ashish Agrawal, Nominee Director, effective April 20, 2026. He has ceased to be a member of the Corporate Social Responsibility Committee and Stakeholder Relationship Committee. The Board expressed appreciation for his contributions. The company also approved audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, and appointed M/s Nilesh Shah & Associates as Secretarial Auditors for five years.

  • Mr. Ashish Agrawal resigns as Nominee Director.
  • Director ceases membership in CSR and Stakeholder committees.
  • Board approves audited financial results for FY26.
  • Secretarial auditors appointed for five years.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [GROWW] Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd Board Approves FY26 Results
item.description:
Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd announced that its Board of Directors has approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The company also noted the resignation of Nominee Director Mr. Ashish Agrawal and approved the appointment of M/s Nilesh Shah & Associates as Secretarial Auditors for five years, subject to shareholder approval. The Board meeting commenced at 11:00 a.m. IST and concluded at 12:40 p.m. IST.

  • Board approved audited standalone and consolidated financial results for FY26.
  • Resignation of Nominee Director Mr. Ashish Agrawal noted.
  • Secretarial Auditors appointed for five years, pending shareholder approval.
  • Board meeting concluded with appreciation for outgoing director.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [GROWW] Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd: Audited FY26 Results Approved
item.description:
Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd announced the approval of its audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The Board of Directors also approved the appointment of M/s Nilesh Shah & Associates as Secretarial Auditors for five years and noted the resignation of Nominee Director Mr. Ashish Agrawal. The company's website will host the information as per SEBI regulations.

  • Audited financial results for Q4 FY26 and FY26 approved.
  • Secretarial Auditors appointed for five years, subject to shareholder approval.
  • Nominee Director Mr. Ashish Agrawal resigned.
  • Financial results and audit report are publicly available.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [GROWW] Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd Board Approves FY26 Results
item.description:
Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd announced the outcome of its Board meeting held on April 20, 2026. The Board approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the company appointed M/s Nilesh Shah & Associates as Secretarial Auditors for five years, subject to shareholder approval. The Board also noted the resignation of Mr. Ashish Agrawal as Nominee Director and expressed appreciation for his contributions. The financial results were accompanied by an audit report with an unmodified opinion from M/s BSR & Co. LLP.

  • Approved audited standalone and consolidated financial results for FY26.
  • Appointed M/s Nilesh Shah & Associates as Secretarial Auditors for five years.
  • Noted resignation of Nominee Director Mr. Ashish Agrawal.
  • Audit report from BSR & Co. LLP confirmed an unmodified opinion.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [JDCABLES] JD Cables Board Approves IPO Monitoring Report
item.description:
JD Cables Ltd held a board meeting on April 20, 2026, to approve the draft Monitoring Agency Report for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. This report, issued by CRISIL Ratings Limited, pertains to the utilization of IPO proceeds. The Audit Committee had previously reviewed and taken the report on record. The company will separately inform the stock exchange of the final signed Monitoring Agency Report.

  • Board approved the draft Monitoring Agency Report for Q4 FY26.
  • Report concerns utilization of IPO proceeds.
  • CRISIL Ratings Limited issued the report.
  • Audit Committee also reviewed and approved the report.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JD Cables Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
